mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_item ( user_id, sku_id, quantity ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{skuId}, #{quantity} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = quantity + VALUES(quantity), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, sku_id, quantity, created_at, updated_at FROM cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND sku_id = #{skuId}

SELECT ci.id, ci.user_id, ci.sku_id, sku.spu_id, sku.sku_code, spu.spu_code, spu.name, c.name AS category_name, co.name AS color, so.code AS size, sku.sale_price, CASE WHEN sku.status = 'on_sale' AND spu.status = 'on_sale' AND COALESCE(inv.available_stock, 0) > 0 THEN 'in_stock' ELSE 'out_of_stock' END AS stock_status, spu.main_image_url, ci.quantity, COALESCE(inv.available_stock, 0) AS available_stock, ci.created_at, ci.updated_at FROM cart_item ci JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = ci.sku_id JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id JOIN category c ON c.id = spu.category_id JOIN color co ON co.id = sku.color_id JOIN size_option so ON so.id = sku.size_id LEFT JOIN inventory inv ON inv.sku_id = sku.id WHERE ci.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ci.updated_at DESC, ci.id DESC
